Contractor Interest Form

NYC / LA / MKE / REMOTE

Zero Overview

Zero is a creative studio founded in NYC. We have offices in New York, Milwaukee, Los Angeles as well as working virtually across the world. Our intention is to create an environment where multidisciplinary teams can solve problems for progressive and contemporary brands. We aim to constantly re-evaluate what it’s like to work with a studio and provide a high degree of value and service to our clients and our team.

---

Thank you for your interest in Zero! This is a place to share relevant information about your skills, capabilities, availability and rate for Contract-based opportunities. Please complete the interest form accessible below. Our team will reach out should we have any opportunities that fit your skill set. 

If you are interested in Full Time opportunities, please check out our careers page for our current postings.

Please note that submission through this form does not automatically add you as an applicant to open positions.

Create a Job Alert

Interested in building your career at Zero Studios? Get future opportunities sent straight to your email.
